title: Bone Block Fix
description: Ever questioned your self why does the bone block turn in to bone meal instead of bones?
body:
# Description:
Ever questioned your self why does the bone block turn in to bone meal instead of bones?

Well, with Bone Block Fix, that issue is no more. this is a light weight datapack that changes 2 recipes.

- Crafting a bone block now requires 9 bones!
- Bone Block when uncrafted will turn in to 9 bones.

this datapack is mainly used for those who wants to store a lot more bone meal, as this allows you to get 27 stacks of bone meal instead of the original 9 stacks.


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
